description_long: This object is a compact, tactical firearm with a boxy, angular design and a long cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The main body is matte black, featuring a prominent pistol grip with textured grooves for improved handling and a secondary vertical foregrip beneath the barrel for added stability. The receiver is rectangular with minimal external detailing, and the magazine appears to be integrated or not visibly protruding. The suppressor is nearly as long as the main body, giving the weapon an elongated silhouette. The trigger guard is squared and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and protection.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a long suppressor, pistol grip, and vertical foregrip. The design is angular and modern, with a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long suppressor, pistol grip, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the suppressor, grips, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the alignment of the grips and suppressor.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical suppressor attached, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, elongated trigger guard with robust, angular geometry and ample finger space
